mapper.update: UPDATE career_loop_session SET target_role = #{targetRole}, target_company_type = #{targetCompanyType}, weekly_hours = #{weeklyHours}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, health_score = #{healthScore}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, target_role, target_company_type, weekly_hours, current_stage, health_score, status, create_time, update_time FROM career_loop_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
